itemReviewed.name: GD Goenka Global School DLF - Sector 24

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Very supportive management and special
appreciation to Ms.Jyotika Ma'am ensuring a smooth admission process.

itemReviewed.name: GD Goenka Global School DLF - Sector 24

itemListElement.reviewBody: Don't focus on the academics. A second class student doesn't even know the english alphabet. Focus on activities but the staff is non cooperative.

itemReviewed.name: GD Goenka Global School DLF - Sector 24

itemListElement.reviewBody: I am a very happy GDGGS parent since last 2 years and I am extremely satisfied with my son's learning and development. I have had a brilliant experience overall from the very beginning. All the teachers have been very approachable, supportive and full of warmth. A very special thanks to Ms. Jyotika, who has been a pillar of support since the beginning, making the whole experience so wonderful.

itemReviewed.name: GD Goenka Global School DLF - Sector 24

itemListElement.reviewBody: We have been associated since the beginning and are very happy with the personal care attention given to my child. The management staff and special thanks to the Principal  are all very helpful always.

itemReviewed.name: GD Goenka Global School DLF - Sector 24

itemListElement.reviewBody:
GD Goenka Global School stands as a premier progressive institution, offering innovative teaching methodologies and a comprehensive approach to student development. My gratitude extends to the esteemed leadership team, particularly Ms. Navina Chadha, for providing an outstanding educational environment tailored to students evolving needs.

As a parent, witnessing the growth and development of my child within the IB framework has been truly inspiring.

I commend Ms. Meenakshi for her invaluable contribution to the admission process, ensuring a seamless transition for my child. Her proactive engagement and effective communication have significantly contributed to a harmonious school-parent partnership.

I would like to extend my sincere appreciation to HRT Ms. Ekta, who serves as the Grade 1 HRT, for her exemplary teaching and mentorship. Ms. Ekta's expertise, passion and unwavering dedication to her craft are truly commendable. Her ability to foster an atmosphere that uplifts students' spirits and guides them toward realizing their fullest potential is noteworthy.

In conclusion, I highly recommend this school to prospective parents and students seeking academic excellence and holistic growth in an ever-evolving world.

itemReviewed.name: GD Goenka Global School DLF - Sector 24

itemListElement.reviewBody: As a parent, I am incredibly pleased with the quality of education and overall experience my child has had at this school. The dedication of the staff , the commitment to academic and personal growth is truly remarkable. I had really great experience with Ms.Jyotika , Ms.Tanu and ms. Kiran patak .

itemReviewed.name: GD Goenka Global School DLF - Sector 24

itemListElement.reviewBody:
My daughter changed after enrolling in GD Goenka.
My daughter used to be very shy, but she has become sociable and is able to communicate on her own.
Thanks to her friendly teachers and friends.
She became interested in English and learned a lot in a few months.
Best of all, she is very enjoying school life and I am satisfied with this school.

itemReviewed.name: GD Goenka Global School DLF - Sector 24

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Exceptionally dedicated, caring teachers and support staff.
For kids ,a great place to explore their talent.

I was worried how nostalgic my son was with his earlier pre primary school and thought it would be difficult to acclimatise…

However my son is being well taken care of at GDGoenka and always been ensured to make the place,  an ecosystem of fun & great learning experience

Special thanks to Principal, admissions Head Ms.Meenakshi and his caring Class teacher

Wishing the school best and trust my experience stays wonderful with the school always.

itemReviewed.name: GD Goenka Global School DLF - Sector 24

itemListElement.reviewBody: I can proudly say that I made the best decision by choosing GD Goenka Global School for my son. I am really happy with his overall development. The teachers are caring and well organised. The security system is great. Everything has been very smooth since the beginning including the admission process, thanks to Ms Meenakshi. Overall I am very satisfied as my son happily looks forward going to school everyday.

itemReviewed.name: GD Goenka Global School DLF - Sector 24

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I am delighted our child attends GD Goenka Global School. The members of staff are professional and friendly, and intentional about the welfare, and wellbeing of the kids.
Starting from a smooth enrollment process in 2020 with an experienced, competent, and very helpful Ms.Jyotika, we also received a great support, and valuable pieces of advice from Ms. Mandeep, and we met excellent and knowledgeable teachers like Ms. Renu, and Ms. Nidhi, who went the extra mile to encourage and motivate the students. In addition the school authorities set an open communication system, and parents are kept in the know of everything happening. I would definitely recommend the school, and thank you everyone for working so hard to make sure you create a positive environment for the children and staff.
